summary: Iteration 41: ImplantLens Clinical Case Album Backend Testing - 16/16 tests PASSED (100%)

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request. Backend-only testing performed.

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Student role): PASS - GET /api/implantlens/cases returns only cases where student_id matches current user
Feature 2 (Supervisor role): PASS - GET /api/implantlens/cases returns cases where supervisor_id or created_by_id matches current user
Feature 3 (Implant Incharge role): PASS - GET /api/implantlens/cases returns ALL cases without filtering
Feature 4 (Case fields): PASS - Each case has id, patient_name, student_name, status, photos_uploaded, photos_total, missing_count, missing_steps
Feature 5 (Procedure photos): PASS - GET /api/procedures/{id}/photos returns phase-wise photo data with step metadata
Feature 6 (Photo steps): PASS - GET /api/photo-steps returns all 44 photo steps across 4 phases with proper structure
Feature 7 (Two-tier rejection regression): PASS - rejection_type 'reconsider' reverts status to draft and resets approval flags
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test procedure (TEST_ImplantLens_Regression) for regression testing, deleted after test completion
context_for_next_testing_agent: ImplantLens feature fully verified. Key endpoints: 1) GET /api/implantlens/cases - Returns cases with photo stats (photos_uploaded, photos_total, missing_count, missing_steps). Role filtering: students see own cases, supervisors see assigned/created cases, admin/incharge see all. 2) GET /api/procedures/{id}/photos - Returns phase-wise photo data with step metadata including label, category, caption, photos array, has_photo boolean. 3) GET /api/photo-steps - Returns all 44 photo step definitions across 4 phases. 4) GET /api/photo-steps/{phase} - Returns steps for specific phase (1-4). Two-tier rejection regression also verified working correctly.

tested_features.implantlens_cases_student_role: PASS - Returns only student's own cases with photo stats
tested_features.implantlens_cases_response_structure: PASS - cases array with id, patient_name, student_name, status, photos_uploaded, photos_total, missing_count, missing_steps
tested_features.implantlens_cases_missing_steps: PASS - missing_steps array limited to 5 items with phase and label
tested_features.photo_steps_all_phases: PASS - Returns 44 total steps across 4 phases
tested_features.photo_steps_by_phase: PASS - Returns steps for specific phase 1-4
tested_features.photo_steps_invalid_phase: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid phase number
tested_features.procedure_photos: PASS - Returns phase-wise photo data with metadata
tested_features.procedure_photos_not_found: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid procedure ID

tested_endpoints.GET /api/implantlens/cases: 200 - Returns cases with photo stats filtered by role
tested_endpoints.GET /api/photo-steps/{phase}: 200 - Returns phase-specific steps, 400 for invalid phase

case_object_fields.photos_uploaded: int - count of steps with at least one photo
case_object_fields.missing_count: int - count of steps without photos
